description: Create and deploy a channel named 'Lipid_Panel_Aggregator' to aggregate fragmented HL7 laboratory results. The channel must collect three separate messages for a single order (Cholesterol, HDL, LDL) from '/home/ga/lab_fragments/' and combine them into a single message. Messages are correlated by Order ID (OBR-2) and sequenced via OBR-20. The final message containing all three OBX segments must be written to '/home/ga/aggregated_output/' only after the '3/3' fragment is received. Ensure the three sample files in the input directory result in exactly one aggregated output file.
